title_zh: Ecom 第一方数据分 5 类做 audience signal
summary_zh: 对 e-commerce 账户,把第一方客户列表细分成 5 类作为 PMax/Demand Gen 的 audience signal:wishlist creators(高意图)、cart abandoners + checkout drop-offs(最热)、past purchases 再切成 category repeat buyers / seasonal shoppers / brand loyalists / discount hunters / high-ticket buyers、loyalty program members。每个 segment 单独上传,告诉 Google 你想要更多哪类客户。Amazon 没有这种第一方数据回灌的机制,但'按购买行为细分客群'这种思路对 Amazon Posts 受众洞察、新品定位有借鉴价值。
quote_en: For Ecom we have wishlist creators, cart abandoners, checkout drop-offs, past purchases which can be segmented out in category repeat buyers, seasonal shoppers, brand loyaltists, discount hunters and high ticket buyers, and lastly loyalty program members.

title_zh: 用 high-value 客户单独建 list 喂算法
summary_zh: 上传 customer list 时如果总量够大,优先上传'高价值客户'细分包(按累计消费、复购、tier 等级切),不要把所有客户塞一个袋子。原理:你给 Google 看的'种子'决定它去找谁——种子是 ICP 高价值客户,扩量找的就是高价值;种子是混合,扩量得到的就是平均水平。如果量太少才合并上传。Amazon Sponsored Display audience targeting 也支持 view/purchase remarketing,选'高价值 ASIN'做种子比'全 ASIN'更精准。
quote_en: If your list becomes too small and if you have just a few really high value customers, consider uploading One customer list, but it's always better to segment them out if you have the volumes and tell Google what your ideal customer profiles really are.

title_zh: Demand Gen 测试预算门槛 15K-50K 别硬上
summary_zh: Google 官方推荐 Demand Gen 测试预算 15K-50K USD / 4-6 周;按 Target CPA 算要日预算 = 15× tCPA(tCPA 100 欧 → 日预算 1500 欧)。Bob 直接说:中小广告主不要碰 Demand Gen,先把 Search/Shopping/PMax 跑满,再上 Display/Video Action,最后才考虑 Demand Gen。原理:upper-funnel 算法需要海量数据找 ICP,预算不够直接烧光不出量。对 Amazon SD/SB:同理 upper-funnel 品牌曝光产品(SB Video、SD reach)在低预算下别开,先把 SP keyword 跑赢再向上扩。
quote_en: Google actually recommends at least 15K budget for four to six weeks, 15K minimum, and they even say minimum budget, up to 50K. So that's a big range that starts at 15K for just four to six weeks.

title_zh: 上漏斗永远要用第三方归因校准
summary_zh: Demand Gen / YouTube / Display 这类上漏斗 campaign 在 Google ads 里会被 DDA 严重过度归因,看起来很赚钱实际可能在'蹭'下漏斗的转化。Miles 的实操:跑这类 campaign 必须配第三方归因工具(Northbeam、Rockerbox 等),否则 Meta 也声称功劳、Google 也声称功劳,加起来比真实订单多 2-3 倍。对 Amazon:站外引流到 Listing 的 SD reach campaign 看 ACOS 也会偏乐观,要用 Brand Analytics 的 New-to-Brand 比例和总销量上扬来判断真实增量。
quote_en: If you add up all of the conversions then you end up by two three times as many conversions that you actually have inside of your back end. So you definitely need an independent tool to look over the attribution of all of your campaigns.

title_zh: 新 campaign 前 2 周 / 50 转化前不动手
summary_zh: Demand Gen launch 后前 2 周 + 累计 50 转化以内不要做任何调整,这是算法 learning period,Google 需要这点量才能找到你的客户在它生态里在哪。中途改 audience / 改创意 / 改预算会重置学习。这个原则对 Amazon SD/SP 完全通用:新建 campaign 前 7-14 天即使数据难看也别频繁动 bid 和 keyword,等系统跑出 baseline 再优化,否则永远在重启。
quote_en: You want to make sure that you do not make any changes in the first couple of two weeks which is a learning period for the demand gen campaign because Google is saying that it needs at least 50 conversions to properly understand where your audience is hanging out.

title_zh: 上漏斗别照搬下漏斗的 hard-CTA 文案
summary_zh: 上漏斗(Demand Gen / YouTube / Display)用户根本不认识你的品牌,直接搬 PMax / Search 的'Book a demo''Buy now'CTA 转化率会很差。要根据'channel temperature'换软一点的 hook——介绍品牌、抛出问题、给 lead magnet。这个原理转 Amazon:SD reach / SB Video 给冷流量看的图文必须强调'是什么、解决什么问题',不要直接堆'Best Seller、Buy Now'——那是 SP 列表页的语言。
quote_en: Do not copy your performance Max headlines and description lines for example that are focused towards book a consultation now or book a demo now. Those are way too hot and way too warm call to actions for upper funnel and mid funnel campaign types.

title_zh: 上漏斗用 GTag 转化、下漏斗用 OCT
summary_zh: Bob 实操:OCT(offline conversion tracking,导入成交线索)在上漏斗 campaign 里归因经常丢——Display/YouTube/Discovery 拿不到这种 conversion。所以上漏斗 campaign 用 Google ads 自带的 GTag pixel 转化作为 primary,下漏斗 Search/PMax 用 OCT。在一个账户里给不同 campaign 设不同 primary conversion goal。Amazon 没有 OCT,但'不同漏斗位的 campaign 看不同的 conversion 指标'这个思路通用——SP 看 ACOS/CPC,SB/SD 看 NTB% 和总销量增量。
quote_en: What I tend to do is I tend to select OCT conversion actions as a primary conversion action for my search campaign for Legion SAS and for my upper funnel mid funnel campaigns I tend to use a Google tag based conversion action and then just use different primary conversions on campaign level.

title_zh: PMax 用 page feeds 锁定落地页
summary_zh: PMax 默认开'final URL expansion'会自己抓站内任意页投 search,完全不可控。新功能 page feeds 让你建一个 URL 清单,告诉 PMax'只能在这些页投',并且可以在 asset group 级别配置不同 page feed。前提:必须把 final URL expansion 关掉。这是最被期待的'拿回控制权'更新。Amazon 类似机制:SP Auto campaign 没法限定到具体 ASIN 段,可以用'product targeting'campaign 拆出来定向投自己最想推的 ASIN。
quote_en: Page feeds, this is the one that I'm most excited about. With page feeds you can get a bit more control over the DSA Dynamic search ads functionality of performance Max. You can set up a feed with different URLs landing pages and then you can say I only want to target these pages.

title_zh: PMax 用 brand exclusion 排除自己品牌词
summary_zh: PMax 历来'抢'品牌词流量、把 Search 里本来就要转化的品牌搜索算成 PMax 功劳,数据严重虚高。新功能 campaign-level brand exclusions 让你直接在 PMax 排除自己品牌+预定义品牌列表(没有的可申请创建),从 search 和 shopping 位都剔掉。以前要走 negative keyword list workaround(找客服开通),现在原生支持。Amazon 同理:做 SP 投放时品牌词 campaign 单独建,Auto 和 broad 里要用 negative keyword 把自己品牌词加进去,避免互相抢量。
quote_en: Campaign level brand exclusions, with this feature you can exclude branded search terms from pmax campaigns and this excludes them from search and shopping placements. PMax loves to take credit for any conversions including branded conversions which heavily inflates the data.

title_zh: PMax experiments 终于能 A/B 测
summary_zh: 新功能 PMax experiments 支持 PMax-vs-PMax A/B 对比,可以测不同 bid strategy / 不同创意 / final URL expansion 开关 / page feed 开关 等。以前只能 PMax vs Standard Shopping。Miles 强调:不要一次改太多变量,挑一个最值得测的先跑。Amazon 平台测试更野——SP campaign 复制后改一个变量(bid 类型、关键词匹配、ASIN 排除)做 split,但要用同样的 budget 和 daypart,否则没意义。
quote_en: Performance Max experiments, soon we will be able to A/B test two different pmax campaigns against each other and that allows us to test different bid strategies, placements, different assets, use final URL expansion yes or no, use page feeds yes or no.

title_zh: Landing page 7 要素信息层级清单
summary_zh: 高转化 landing page 必须按 information hierarchy 排好 7 个要素:dream outcome(梦想结果)、big problems(痛点)、value(价值)、uniqueness(差异化)、objections(异议处理)、CTA(为什么现在行动)、credibility(信任凭证)。每个 element 都对应一个用户问题。原理:信息不能少(用户没决策依据)也不能多(信息过载,用户跑掉)。Amazon Listing 的 A+ Content 和主图 5 张直接对应这 7 个要素——这套框架可以直接套到 listing 优化。
quote_en: These are the most important information hierarchy elements that you should address on your landing page: dream outcome, big problems and solution, value, uniqueness, objections, call to action, credibility. So those are the seven core components.

title_zh: Above-the-fold 决定是否跳出
summary_zh: Bob 用 Tilmet(travel nursing 招聘)做反面教材:above-the-fold 只放了 headline + sub-headline + 表单,但用户根本不知道'travel nursing job 是什么''你比对手强在哪''有什么社会证明',直接跳。原理:屏幕首屏决定 5 秒内的去留——必须同时回答'你是什么 + 我为什么要选你 + 凭证'。Amazon Listing 主图位 + 标题 + 5 个要点 = 同样的 above-the-fold,首屏没解释清楚价值,用户不会下滑看 A+。
quote_en: Just by looking at the above the fold part of this landing page you're like, I have no idea what's going on here and you're asking me to convert too soon. You're asking me to leave my contact details behind without knowing what your unique value proposition is.

title_zh: 冷流量 LP 多铺内容、热流量 LP 砍到 CTA
summary_zh: 判断 landing page 信息密度的核心是 traffic temperature:冷流量(YouTube / Display 来的人不知道你是谁)需要更多教育型内容,从问题陈述到方案介绍到信任背书一路铺;热流量(Search 高商业意图词)直接给 CTA + 几条核心卖点就够。原理:awareness level 越低,需要的'决策铺垫'越多。Amazon 同理:站内自然搜索流量(热)直接看图听 bullet 就买,站外引流来的(冷)需要 Listing 视频和 A+ 故事铺充分。
quote_en: The colder the traffic, the more content you often need to include, and the warmer the traffic, the more of a transactional or commercial intent the user has, the less content you need to basically let the potential customer complete your call to action.

title_zh: 把账户工作分 3 桶、70/30 时间分配
summary_zh: Bob 把账户优化分 3 类:(1)regular monitoring(每周/每月固定的 SQR 排负、ad asset 测试、结构调整);(2)one-off high-impact improvements(比如上 enhanced conversion、加 first-party 数据);(3)experiments(测新落地页、新 offer、新 bid 策略)。时间默认 70% 给 regular、30% 给一次性+实验;成熟账户(SQR 已经很干净)反过来 30/70。Amazon 同理:不要把所有时间花在每天扫 SP 加负关键词,要留时间测新 ASIN/新 keyword 集/新 SD audience。
quote_en: Generally I think gut feeling wise, I spent 70 percent of my time towards regular optimizations and 30 percent maybe up to 40 percent towards one-off improvements and experiments. That's how I try to allocate my time per client but it differs per client.

title_zh: 实验用 ICE 评分挑顺序
summary_zh: 实验积压一堆没法都做,Bob 用 ICE 模型排序:Impact(影响)、Confidence(信心)、Ease(易实施),每项 1-10 分相加,先做总分最高的——'有把握 + 高影响 + 容易做'。原理:别被高大上但难做的拖慢节奏,先用容易的小赢累积速度。Amazon 同理:测新 keyword 段、改主图、加 SBV 视频、试新 SD audience——每件事先用 ICE 排,先动'当周就能看出效果'的。
quote_en: I like to use the ICE scoring model. The I stands for impact, the C stands for confidence so how sure am I that this will actually perform well, and the E stands for ease so how easy is it to set up. I just start with the experiment that has the highest score.

title_zh: ROAS 转 POAS 利润导向也可能炸盘
summary_zh: Bob 真实翻车案例:把 e-commerce 客户从 ROAS(收入维度)切到 POAS(利润维度)bid strategy,结果转换期销量崩盘 2 周也回不来,只能切回 ROAS 把 POAS 当辅助指标看。教训:看似'更精准'的 bid strategy 切换有学习期成本,4 次中只赌赢 3 次,失败要敢于回滚。Amazon 同理:从 'optimize for sales' 切 'optimize for new-to-brand' 或调 dynamic bid 模式时,留好回滚阈值(2 周或 ACOS 涨 30%),别死撑。
quote_en: Where we tried to transition from a revenue-based ROAS bidding strategy to a profit-based ROAS strategy. It completely backfired. After two weeks we decided to revert back to the revenue based strategy.

title_zh: 登录页 CRO 是优化师下一个杠杆
summary_zh: Bob 强调:Google ads in-app 优化已经被自动化吃了大半,把转化率从 2% 提到 2.5% 的杠杆远比改 bid 大——CR +25% 等于 bid 力 +25%、可入更多 auction、跑量也跟着上。所以高级优化师正越来越多把时间花在 landing page 优化,owns 整条 click-to-conversion 链路。Amazon 同理:SP/SD 的 CPC 在涨,'把 Listing CR 从 8% 提到 12%'的杠杆远超只动 bid——主图、A+、视频、价格、Coupon 才是真正可大提升 ROAS 的地方。
quote_en: If you were to improve your conversion rates by 25%, that's a lot. That's so much more bidding power and it opens up so much more volumes inside of your Google ads campaigns where it also opens up doors for experimenting with mid and upper funnel campaign types.

title_zh: Smart bidding 只买 Google 已知会买的 10%
summary_zh: John Moran 的核心洞察:smart bidding 不是给你扩量,它是把'Google 已经知道会转化'的那 10% 客流锁给你,你出价高就多分点;tROAS / tCPA 越紧、Google 越死锁在这个池子。所以你 spend +50% 但 click 只 +20%、CPC 还涨——根本买不到那剩下的 90%。Jenny Marvin(Google 官方)在 LinkedIn 也确认了'smart bidding does not optimize for incremental impression delivery'。这点对 Amazon SP 'Dynamic bids - up & down' 同理:它优化已知转化,不会主动扩量,真要拿增量得换 fixed bid + 自己控关键词。
quote_en: Smart bidding does not optimize for incremental impression delivery. Google has a finite number of people that it knows are going to convert and whomever spend the most wins them. As you scale that campaign you cap out, that's where you see increase my ad spend and I don't get incremental impressions.

title_zh: 切 manual CPC + YouTube engagement 拿剩 90%
summary_zh: John Moran 的 hack:把 primary conversion 改成 'YouTube engagement'(Google 自带、长期有数据,不会重置学习期),同时 campaign 切 manual CPC。结果 Google 看不到'这个转化对你很值钱',不会把你锁进高价池,CPC 直接砍半,接到的是 sales cycle 更长的冷流量(剩下 90%)。要点:必须配第三方归因 + meta/YouTube remarketing 接住冷流。Amazon 没有 manual CPC 这种 trick,但同源思路:auto campaign 跑久了 ACOS 会卡死,要拆出 manual broad / phrase 重新探索新词。
quote_en: I changed my primary conversion action to YouTube engagements. YouTube engagements is a trusted Google hosted conversion action that doesn't need to be relearned. Google doesn't see that this is valuable to me yet so it's not going to price fix me into the upper auctions.

title_zh: 永远不信平台给的 conversion 数据
summary_zh: John Moran 直接说:Google ads 后台除了'spend'之外的数据都被设计来让你花更多钱,尤其是 conversion tracking。他建议:'练成不看平台 conversion 也能跑好 Google ads 的能力'——以业务真实订单(后台/CRM/独立归因工具)为准,不要拿 Google ads 后台的 conversion 数当真。Amazon 一样:Brand Analytics 和 Business Reports 才是真账,Sponsored Ads 后台报的'attributed sales'有 14 天点击窗,会偷下漏斗自然单的功劳——做品牌 ROI 决策必须看总销量+ NTB%,不只 ACOS。
quote_en: Most of that information inside of it besides your spend is designed to make you spend more money. Never measure the success of your business from looking at anything to do with the conversion tracking inside of Google ads holistically.

title_zh: 卖结果不卖产品:目的地不是机票
summary_zh: Miles 套用 Hormozi 的 'Make offers so good people feel stupid saying no':offer 文案不要列 feature(机票、床垫、敞篷车),要卖 dream outcome(目的地、好觉、风吹脸)。原理:用户买的是改变后的状态,不是产品本身。把每个 pain point 列出来,告诉他们'不行动的代价是什么',再给方案。Amazon Listing 的 bullet 和 A+ 直接套这个模板:不要写'304 不锈钢、容量 2L',要写'省下早晨 10 分钟做早餐的时间、家人多睡半小时'。
quote_en: You do not want to sell a plane ticket but you sell the destination. You do not want to sell the mattress but you want to sell a good night's of sleep. You do not want to sell a convertible but you want to sell the feeling of wind in your hair.

title_zh: 受众越精准、文案越能打
summary_zh: Miles 的反例:'瑜伽教练'这个 positioning 太宽,谁都说不上对。改成'专为孕期妈妈的产前瑜伽专家'——立刻有受众感,文案、关键词、视觉全都能围绕这一群人写。'内容写手'→ '为科技初创公司写技术文章的内容专家'。原理:specific positioning 提高 message-market fit,转化率比泛投高一个量级。Amazon 同理:不要做'多功能水杯',做'户外露营防漏 1L 钛杯'——SP keyword 选词、主图、A+ 都能更聚焦,比 generic listing 的 CR 高 50%+。
quote_en: Prenatal yoga specialist for expecting mothers, content creator specializing in tech articles for startups, Google ads specialist for gyms with 10 plus locations. By being really specific in targeting your dream client segment you can also increase the relevancy of your copy.

title_zh: 5 阶段 awareness 决定推 offer 还是 lead magnet
summary_zh: Eugene Schwartz 的 5 阶段 awareness:unaware → problem-aware → solution-aware → product-aware → most-aware。前 3 阶段(冷流量)直接推'立即购买'是浪费,该用 lead magnet(电子书、清单、白皮书)先教育;后 2 阶段(热流量,搜索意图明确)才推 marketing offer 和 hard CTA。原理:offer 温度必须匹配 channel 温度。Amazon 站外引流到 Listing 一样:Display/YouTube 冷流量来,Listing 上半部要先解决'这是什么、能解决我什么问题',下半部 A+ 才放硬卖点。
quote_en: You do not want to be communicating your marketing offer in the first three phases which are the unaware phase, problem aware phase and solution aware phase. Over here it's way better to work with a lead magnet to introduce your solution to a problem.

title_zh: 看 MER 不要看单平台 ROAS
summary_zh: 多平台投放时(Google + Meta + TikTok + Reddit)每个平台都会说自己 ROAS 好,把数据加起来才发现总收入不及预期——平台普遍 over-attribute 自家功劳。Miles 用 Northbeam 等三方工具看 Media Efficiency Ratio(总广告支出 / 总收入),并坚持每天登录 Shopify 看真实昨日收入对照广告花费。Amazon 同理:跑 SD/SP + 站外引流 + DSP 时,只看 ACOS 会被骗,要看 TACOS / 总销售额对总广告支出的比例,否则会以为在赚钱实际在亏。
quote_en: Google's gonna say we got a good roas, Facebook is going to say we've got good roas, TikTok is even going to say we've got good roas, and then if you combine all that data then sooner or later you're gonna find out that you thought you had more revenue against the cost you're getting.
